betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f is a §6single block§f tile that scans a planet's atmosphere to determine its §6breathability§f, §6composition§f, §6pressure§f, and §6toxicity§f. It is the §6gateway block§f to the §6Atmosphere Terraforming§f and §6Gas Collection§f questlines in AR. The analyzer requires a §6Planet ID Chip§f for the destination to know which atmosphere to sample.

§6Production Path (atmanalyser.json)§f:
- Machine: §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) at 1000 ticks
- Input: 1x §6libvulpes:battery:0§f, 1x §6Advanced Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:2), 1x §6User Interface§f (advancedrocketry:misc:0), 1x §6Lens§f (advancedrocketry:lens:0), 1x §6plateTin§f (forge:ore_dict)
- Output: 1x §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f (advancedrocketry:atmanalyser)
- Energy: 1 RF/t
- Power: 100 RF/t continuous

The analyzer's GUI shows the §6current atmosphere composition§f (O2, N2, CO2, etc.), the §6breathability score§f (0-100), and a §6toxicity warning§f if the atmosphere is unsafe. The analyzer outputs §6liquid oxygen§f and other gases to an adjacent tank for use in the §6Atmosphere Terraformer§f (chain).

The atmosphere analyzer is a prerequisite for the §6Seal Detector§f (10063), §6Biome Scanner§f (10064), §6Biome Changer§f (10065), §6Navigation Beacon§f (10066), §6Space Elevator§f (10067), §6Orbital Laser Drill§f (10068), and §6Railgun§f (10069). It is the §6single most important§f infrastructure block for any §6planetary mission§f.

§eTip§f: Place the analyzer inside a §6sealed room§f on the destination planet — the analyzer reads the §6local atmosphere§f in a 16-block radius. Bring at least 32 §6Advanced Circuits§f (ic:2) and 64 §6plateTin§f to support multiple analyzer placements across different biomes.
